article_title: Headlamps on Motorcycles and Motor-Driven Cycles
text: Every motorcycle during darkness shall be equipped with at least one and not more than two lighted headlamps which shall conform to the requirements and limitations of this division.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 2. Lighting Equipment [24250 - 26106]
#### Article 13. Headlamps on Motorcycles and Motor-Driven Cycles [25650 - 25651]
##### § 25650

Every motorcycle during darkness shall be equipped with at least one and not more than two lighted headlamps which shall conform to the requirements and limitations of this division.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Every motorcycle during darkness shall be equipped with at least one and not more than two lighted headlamps which shall conform to the requirements and limitations of this division.
